nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Louisiade pitta
nodes.summary: Louisiade pitta（Louisiade pitta，学名 Erythropitta meeki），主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It may be threatened by habitat loss, but is currently listed by the IUCN as Data Deficient as there have been no definite records since the type specimen was collected in 1898
